title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
summary: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.
title_es: Kleiner Perkins recauda $3.5B con enfoque total en IA
bajada: El fondo de venture capital Kleiner Perkins cierra una ronda de $3.5B, con $1B para startups early-stage y $2.5B para empresas late-stage. Esta inversión masiva refleja la confianza del mercado en oportunidades de IA en todas las etapas.
bajada_en: Venture capital firm Kleiner Perkins closes a $3.5B fundraise, with $1B for early-stage startups and $2.5B for late-stage companies. This massive investment reflects market confidence in AI opportunities across all stages.

title: Arm’s CEO Insists the Market Needs His New CPU. It Could Piss Everyone Off
summary: Arm just confirmed the rumors: It’s producing its own chip for the first time. CEO Rene Haas explains why this won’t alienate the many chipmakers who license the company’s designs.
title_es: Arm lanza su primer CPU propio tras 30 años de solo licencias
bajada: Arm confirma que produce su propio chip por primera vez en su historia, el Arm AGI CPU, diseñado para inferencia de IA. El CEO asegura que esto no alienará a los chipmakers que licencian sus diseños, pero marca un cambio estratégico significativo en la compañía.
bajada_en: Arm confirms it's manufacturing its own chip for the first time, the Arm AGI CPU, designed for AI inference. The CEO assures this won't alienate chipmakers licensing its designs, but marks a significant strategic shift.

title: Arm’s first CPU ever will plug into Meta’s AI data centers later this year
summary: After decades of only licensing its chip designs for others to use, UK-based Arm revealed the first chip it's producing on its own, and the first customer. Dubbed the Arm AGI CPU, it's another chip designed for inference, or running the cloud processing for AI tools like AI agents that can continue to spawn more […]
title_es: Arm AGI CPU será usado por Meta en data centers de IA este año
bajada: Arm reveló su primer CPU propio, el Arm AGI CPU, con Meta como primer cliente para sus data centers de IA. Este chip de inferencia marca la entrada de Arm como fabricante de hardware después de décadas como licenciador de diseños.
bajada_en: Arm revealed its first in-house CPU, the Arm AGI CPU, with Meta as the first customer for its AI data centers. This inference chip marks Arm's entry as a hardware manufacturer after decades as a design licensor.

title: TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression
title_es: Google presenta TurboQuant: compresión extrema para LLMs eficientes
bajada: Google Research lanza TurboQuant, un algoritmo de compresión que reduce la memoria del cache key-value de LLMs en 6x con speedups de hasta 8x sin pérdida de precisión. Esta tecnología redefine la eficiencia en IA y es especialmente valiosa para despliegues edge y mobile.
bajada_en: Google Research launches TurboQuant, a compression algorithm that reduces LLM key-value cache memory by 6x with up to 8x speedups with zero accuracy loss. This technology redefines AI efficiency, especially valuable for edge and mobile deployments.

title: New quant from google research
summary: Introducing TurboQuant: Our new compression algorithm that reduces LLM key-value cache memory by at least 6x and delivers up to 8x speedup, all with zero accuracy loss, redefining AI efficiency. Read the blog to learn how it achieves these resultssubmitted by/u/takuonline[link][comments]
title_es: TurboQuant de Google logra compresión 6x en LLMs sin pérdida
bajada: Google Research presenta TurboQuant, que reduce el uso de memoria en LLMs hasta 6x y acelera ejecución hasta 8x manteniendo precisión total. Este avance es crítico para hacer IA más accesible en dispositivos con recursos limitados.
bajada_en: Google Research presents TurboQuant, reducing LLM memory usage by up to 6x and speeding execution by 8x while maintaining full accuracy. This breakthrough is critical for making AI accessible on resource-constrained devices.

title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
title_es: OpenAI lanza políticas de seguridad para menores en IA
bajada: OpenAI presenta gpt-oss-safeguard, herramientas basadas en prompts para que developers modernicen riesgos específicos de edad en sistemas de IA. Esta iniciativa busca facilitar la creación de experiencias de IA más seguras para usuarios adolescentes.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduces gpt-oss-safeguard, prompt-based tools to help developers moderate age-specific risks in AI systems. This initiative aims to make it easier to build safer AI experiences for teenage users.

title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
title_es: ChatGPT integra búsqueda visual de productos con protocolo de comercio agentico
bajada: OpenAI expande ChatGPT con capacidades de descubrimiento de productos, comparativas lado a lado e integración de merchants mediante el Agentic Commerce Protocol. Esta funcionalidad transforma ChatGPT en una herramienta de compra interactiva con experiencia visual inmersiva.
bajada_en: OpenAI expands ChatGPT with product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration using the Agentic Commerce Protocol. This feature transforms ChatGPT into an interactive shopping tool with immersive visual experiences.

title: Anthropic’s Claude Code gets ‘safer’ auto mode
summary: Anthropic has launched an "auto mode" for Claude Code, a new tool that lets AI make permissions-level decisions on users' behalf. The company says the feature offers vibe coders a safer alternative between constant handholding or giving the model dangerous levels of autonomy. Claude Code is capable of acting independently on users' behalf, a useful […]
title_es: Claude Code de Anthropic estrena modo automático más seguro
bajada: Anthropic lanza un "auto mode" para Claude Code que permite a la IA tomar decisiones de permisos de forma independiente con mayor seguridad. La nueva modalidad ofrece un balance entre la asistencia constante y otorgar al modelo niveles peligrosos de autonomía.
bajada_en: Anthropic launches an 'auto mode' for Claude Code that allows AI to make permission-level decisions independently with greater safety. The new feature balances constant assistance with giving the model dangerous levels of autonomy.

title: Agentic commerce runs on truth and context
summary: Imagine telling a digital agent, “Use my points and book a family trip to Italy. Keep it within budget, pick hotels we’ve liked before, and handle the details.” Instead of returning a list of links, the agent assembles an itinerary and executes the purchase. That shift, from assistance to execution, is what makes agentic AI…
title_es: Comercio agentico: de la asistencia a la ejecución automática
bajada: MIT Technology Review analiza cómo los agentes de IA evolucionan desde herramientas de asistencia a sistemas que ejecutan tareas complejas de forma independiente, como reservar viajes o hacer compras. Este cambio fundamental requiere que los agentes comprendan contexto profundo y tomen decisiones autónomas.
bajada_en: MIT Technology Review explores how AI agents evolve from assistance tools to systems that independently execute complex tasks like booking trips or making purchases. This fundamental shift requires agents to understand deep context and make autonomous decisions.

title: The AI Hype Index: AI goes to war
summary: AI is at war. Anthropic and the Pentagon feuded over how to weaponize Anthropic’s AI model Claude; then OpenAI swept the Pentagon off its feet with an “opportunistic and sloppy” deal. Users quit ChatGPT in droves. People marched through London in the biggest protest against AI to date. If you’re keeping score, Anthropic—the company founded…
title_es: Antropic y OpenAI compiten por contratos militares de IA
bajada: Anthropic y OpenAI disputaron contratos con el Pentágono sobre cómo militarizar sus modelos de IA. OpenAI ganó con un acuerdo que generó protesta de usuarios y marchas públicas contra la militarización de IA en Londres.
bajada_en: Anthropic and OpenAI competed for Pentagon contracts over how to weaponize their AI models. OpenAI won with a deal that sparked user backlash and major public protests against AI militarization in London.

title: Advancing Open Source AI, NVIDIA Donates Dynamic Resource Allocation Driver for GPUs to Kubernetes Community
summary: Artificial intelligence has rapidly emerged as one of the most critical workloads in modern computing. For the vast majority of enterprises, this workload runs on Kubernetes, an open source platform that automates the deployment, scaling and management of containerized applications. To help the global developer community manage high-performance AI infrastructure with greater transparency and efficiency, […]
title_es: NVIDIA dona driver de asignación dinámica de recursos a Kubernetes
bajada: NVIDIA dona herramientas open-source para gestionar infraestructura de IA de alto rendimiento en Kubernetes con mayor transparencia y eficiencia. Esta contribución facilita que empresas manejen cargas de trabajo de IA a escala en plataformas containerizadas.
bajada_en: NVIDIA donates open-source tools to manage high-performance AI infrastructure on Kubernetes with greater transparency and efficiency. This contribution helps enterprises handle AI workloads at scale on containerized platforms.

title: Blowing Off Steam: How Power-Flexible AI Factories Can Stabilize the Global Energy Grid
summary: At the half-time whistle of the UEFA EURO 2020 round of 16 football match between England and Germany, millions of viewers stepped away from their screens in the U.K. to do the same thing at the same time — turn on their kettles. National Grid, which provides electricity for England and Wales, saw a demand […]
title_es: Data centers de IA flexibles podrían estabilizar redes eléctricas globales
bajada: NVIDIA analiza cómo las "AI factories" con capacidad de adaptarse al consumo energético pueden ayudar a estabilizar la demanda de electricidad global. El concepto propone usar la flexibilidad de cargas de trabajo de IA para balancear picos de consumo en redes eléctricas.
bajada_en: NVIDIA analyzes how 'AI factories' with power-flexible capabilities can help stabilize global electricity demand. The concept proposes using AI workload flexibility to balance consumption peaks on electrical grids.

title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
title_es: OpenAI Foundation invertirá $1B en curas de enfermedades e IA resiliente
bajada: OpenAI anuncia planes para invertir al menos $1 billón a través de su fundación en cura de enfermedades, oportunidad económica, resiliencia en IA y programas comunitarios. Esta iniciativa filantrópica busca ampliar el acceso y el impacto positivo de la IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI announces plans to invest at least $1 billion through its foundation in disease cures, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs. This philanthropic initiative aims to expand AI's positive impact and accessibility.

title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
title_es: Hugging Face presenta EVA: framework para evaluar agentes de voz
bajada: Hugging Face en colaboración con ServiceNow lanza EVA, un nuevo framework para evaluar agentes de voz en IA. Esta herramienta facilita a developers crear y testear sistemas de IA conversacional más robustos.
bajada_en: Hugging Face in collaboration with ServiceNow launches EVA, a new framework to evaluate voice AI agents. This tool helps developers create and test more robust conversational AI systems.

title: With Sift Stack, two ex-SpaceX engineers are bringing the software that helped launch rockets to the factory floor
summary: Sift is building the data infrastructure for advanced manufacturing.
title_es: Ex ingenieros de SpaceX crean Sift Stack para manufactura avanzada
bajada: Dos ex ingenieros de SpaceX fundan Sift para llevar software de infraestructura de datos usado en cohetes a fábricas inteligentes. Sift construye la base de datos para manufactura avanzada con tecnología rocket-grade.
bajada_en: Two ex-SpaceX engineers launch Sift to bring rocket-grade software infrastructure to advanced manufacturing factories. Sift builds the data foundation for smart manufacturing using aerospace-grade technology.
